summary: Runbook Auto-Match feature testing completed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - runbook panel visible, 5 matches displayed for offline alert, expandable steps with commands (green monospace) and expected results (cyan). Web Console V4 regression: 6/6 passed. Device Profiles regression: 10/10 passed.

minor.issue: MongoDB ObjectId was being returned in response causing 500 error - FIXED by adding data.pop('_id', None) before return

critical_code_review_comments: routes/runbooks.py: POST /api/runbooks/seed-defaults correctly seeds 8 runbooks (idempotent via seed:<slug> tags)
routes/runbooks.py: GET /api/runbooks returns items with new fields: profile_keys, capability_match, vendor_match, severity_match
routes/runbooks.py: GET /api/runbooks/match/alert/{id} returns {alert, context, matches} with scoring algorithm working correctly
routes/runbooks.py: Scoring: profile_key=+5, keyword=+3 each, device_type=+2, vendor=+2, capability=+2 each, severity=+1
routes/runbooks.py: Context enrichment from device_poll_status (profile_key, vendor, family) + device_profiles.get_profile() for capabilities
AlertDetailPage.js: useEffect calls /api/runbooks/match/alert/{id} and renders RunbookMatchCard components
AlertDetailPage.js: Panel has data-testid='alert-runbooks-panel', cards have data-testid='runbook-match-{id}'
AlertDetailPage.js: Toggle button data-testid='runbook-toggle-{id}', steps container data-testid='runbook-steps-{id}'
AlertDetailPage.js: Steps show command in green monospace (text-emerald-300), expected_result in cyan (text-cyan-300)
AlertDetailPage.js: Context badge shows 'device: vendor/profile_key' when available
AlertDetailPage.js: No-match state shows 'Nessun runbook corrisponde' + create link (data-testid='runbook-create-link')
seed_data_creation: 8 seed runbooks already present from previous session (synology-disk-degraded, synology-volume-full, fortinet-vpn-down, apc-ups-on-battery, hp-switch-port-down, unifi-ap-offline, ilo-fan-critical, device-offline-generic)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Runbook Auto-Match feature fully tested. All 8 seed runbooks present with correct profile_keys, capability_match, vendor_match, severity_match fields. Match endpoint returns up to 5 matches with _match_score and _match_reasons. Frontend AlertDetailPage shows 'Runbook suggeriti' panel with expandable cards showing steps, commands (green), and expected results (cyan). Web Console V4 and Device Profiles regression tests pass.

seed_defaults_api.idempotent: PASS - second call returns inserted=0, skipped=8

list_runbooks_api.has_new_fields: PASS - profile_keys, capability_match, vendor_match, severity_match present

bug_fix_applied.issue: POST /api/runbooks returned 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId in response
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added data.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() before returning data
